arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 20 this weekend and James Mason has collated our writers' best bets for all seven games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Ange Postecoglou's side 'in four-way battle' for £31.5m centre-back
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur apparently enter the race to sign AC Milan centre-back Fikayo Tomori as Ange Postecoglou seeks solutions to his side's defensive crisis.

arts.ttl: Newcastle fan favourite with 30 goals & 12 assists on the verge of exit as club gives green light to transfe
arts.sum: Charlotte FC are reportedly close to securing the signing of Newcastle United star Miguel Almiron, with the Paraguayan international set to leave the Premier League club after five seasons. Almiron, who joined Newcastle in 2019 for a club-record £21 million from Atlanta United, has found his opportunities limited this season under manager Eddie Howe. Despite […] The post Newcastle fan favourite with 30 goals & 12 assists on the verge of exit as club gives green light to transfe appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham takeover latest as Amanda Staveley talks and lucrative Qatari offer revealed
arts.sum: Speaking to the Express in July 2023, a close business associate of the American rapper said: "More than a few of the very top clubs there – like Manchester United, Liverpool and Chelsea – are now under US ownership and Jay would jump at the chance of a controlling interest at board level somewhere with the global reach of Spurs." According to Bloomberg in July, the 51-year-old, who had recently stepped down from the Newcastle United board, identified Tottenham as a possible target as she looked for her next investment opportunity .

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham now risk being priced out of move for 'one of the best' young full-backs in the world
arts.sum: With the January transfer window now open, Tottenham Hotspur finally have a chance to bolster their depleted defensive ranks. Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven,...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa join Tottenham in race to sign brilliant attacker with 14 goals & 11 assists this season
arts.sum: Tottenham and Aston Villa are among clubs reportedly eyeing Celtic winger Nicolas Kuhn as they seek to bolster their squad in the transfer market. The 25-year-old German has been in exceptional form this season, drawing interest from several Premier League clubs, including Spurs, Newcastle, and Aston Villa said to be keeping a close watch. Aston […] The post Aston Villa join Tottenham in race to sign brilliant attacker with 14 goals & 11 assists this season appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ex-Newcastle star set for nervy return as 15-game record sums up Spurs struggles
arts.sum: Postecoglou blames Spurs' iffy form - nine PL defeats already this season - on a horrific injury list which has unquestionably struck at their very heart but equally others believe his insistence on playing a ridiculously high line has caused chaos. Certainly United are chasing a double because they took full advantage of Tottenham parking their back four almost on the halfway line up here when Alexander Isak scored his first of many this season which turned out to be the winner.

arts.ttl: Tottenham make contact for PSG striker Randal Kolo Muani amidst Juventus interest
arts.sum: Tottenham are set to compete with Serie A giants Juventus in the race to sign Paris Saint-Germain’s Randal Kolo Muani. According to a report by Sport Italia, Juventus is probing…

arts.ttl: Tottenham have ‘asked for information’ for defender – Player set for January exit
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur currently have no fit centre-backs in their squad. Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven, Radu Dragusin and Ben Davies are all out injured and this may need to be addressed in during the January window A new name has emerged as a potential target and journalist Alessandro Giovanni Pagliarini claims Tottenham are showing The post Tottenham have ‘asked for information’ for defender – Player set for January exit appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel to kick off England role by watching Tottenham host Newcastle
arts.sum: German’s contract officially started on New Year’s Day Head coach to visit St George’s Park and meet Lee Carsley Thomas Tuchel will attend his first match as England’s head coach on Saturday lunchtime when Tottenham host Newcastle. The 51-year-old German, whose contract started on New Year’s Day, will attend further games across the Premier League weekend alongside his assistant, Anthony Barry. The match at Spurs will give him the opportunity to see James Maddison, Dominic Solanke, Anthony Gordon and Lewis Hall. Tuchel and his support team are then due to visit the training base at St George’s Park for the first time next week. Continue reading...
